name: the weird mansion
description:
Tentacles, demihumans... the mansion you've stumbled into harbors all manner of creatures, ready to give you "pleasant experiences."

────────

The endless corridors and countless rooms weren't the only things in this mansion. You couldn't shake the feeling that the portraits along the halls were watching you, and in your peripheral vision, you caught glimpses of tentacles writhing in empty rooms... That couldn't be real, could it?

────────

Stay here, and you'll experience more "hallucinations." The higher your "hallucination" level rises, the more you'll see...
creator: Ra2024
